title: Goety & Spillage
description: Compatibility mod between Goety and Illage & Spillage
body:
**Goety & Spillage** is a compatibility mod between [Goety](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/goety) and [Illage & Spillage](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/illage-and-spillage)/[Portage](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/illage-and-spillage-finally-ported), that allows you to gain access to certain spells and abilities of the dastardly illagers of the latter mod!

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89800eb53001cf71e9190d71b3faf102ba0a8e6a_0.webp)

### Recommendations:
[It's Magispelling Time](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/its-magispelling-time) by Undying, for gaining Magispeller's abilities.

### Discord:
My Discord Server: https://discord.gg/utQqkWUuDc

### Donations:
Feel free to buy me a coffee: https://ko-fi.com/polarice3

Credits
- Yellowbross, Creator of Illage and Spillage.
- TheDarkPeasant, Creator of Illage and Portage.
